coverage_note: Full text comparison against authoritative PDF source (pdftotext plain text extraction confirmed against image-rendered pages). All seven proposed defects verified byte-exact in DB with source confirmation from PDF. Markup contamination flagged per rule 11 (not proposed). Quote character policy followed per rule 9.

proposals.source_quote: Its partners include the Kramlichs and the Hales. The Kramlichs have a 25 percent interest in the partnership.
proposals.evidence: DB text renders word-split as 'Kram-lichs' with mid-word hyphen; PDF and all rendered pages show 'Kramlichs' as continuous surname. Verified at Paragraph 2.

proposals.source_quote: then Spectrum Care, was executed on May 28, 1999, and contains an arbitration clause.
proposals.evidence: DB text shows accent mark (é) on 'executéd'; PDF shows plain 'executed'. This is an OCR artifact (accent rendering error). Verified at Paragraph 2.

proposals.source_quote: Gary Kramlich signed the LLC operating agreement containing the arbitration clause and, assuming Glory Kramlich has a claim against the LLC
proposals.evidence: DB has 'LLG' (OCR misread C as G); PDF plainly shows 'LLC'. Verified at Paragraph 19.

proposals.source_quote: Courts may adjudicate actual controversies before a court. See Interest of W.O., 2004 ND 8, ¶ 10, 673 N.W.2d 264.
proposals.evidence: DB shows case name as 'Merest' (OCR misread 'Int' as 'Mer'); PDF plain text confirms 'Interest of W.O.' Verified at Paragraph 21.

proposals.source_quote: and we resolve any doubts concerning the scope of arbitrable issues in favor of arbitration when there is a broad arbitration clause and no limitations or exclusions.
proposals.evidence: DB shows fused word 'abroad' (missing space); PDF shows 'a broad' as two words. Verified at Paragraph 13.

proposals.source_quote: and we resolve any doubts concerning the scope of arbitrable issues in favor of arbitration when there is a broad arbitration clause and no limitations or exclusions.
proposals.evidence: DB shows 'arid' (OCR misread 'and' with 'n' as 'r'); PDF shows 'and'. Verified at Paragraph 13.

proposals.source_quote: Of course, the Somerset-Minot, LLC operating agreement requires that any claims raised by the Kramlichs
proposals.evidence: DB shows 'Somerset Minot' as two words without hyphen; PDF shows 'Somerset-Minot' with hyphen (consistent with caption and title page). Verified at Paragraph 15.

flags.description: Markup contamination: double asterisks appear 3 times (lines 149, 170, 173). Italic markup pattern shows '*Real Builders**,*' instead of correct '*Real Builders,*' (extra asterisks around comma). Per rule 11, flagged but not proposed—separate deterministic pass owns cleanup of leftover markdown.

proposals.evidence: Stray dots before 'Board' and 'that' are OCR artifacts not present in authoritative PDF source.

proposals.source_quote: disbarred from the practice of law in North Dakota, effective immediately.
proposals.evidence: Wrong curly quote character; PDF shows plain space before 'North Dakota'.

proposals.source_quote: admitted to practice law in North Dakota on September 23, 1985. Lee was
proposals.evidence: Missing space after comma in date; PDF shows proper spacing.

proposals.source_quote: was hired to represent a client in a family law matter. The client paid
proposals.evidence: Diacritic accent on 'a' is OCR corruption; PDF shows plain 'a'.

proposals.source_quote: of which was advance payment of fees. One-thousand dollars of the $9,000 was a loan
proposals.evidence: Stray dot before 'the' is OCR artifact; PDF shows no dot.

proposals.source_quote: A parenting investigator was not used, but Lee did not refund the money.
proposals.evidence: Wrong curly quote; PDF shows comma with proper spacing.

proposals.source_quote: lawyer shall . . . "surrender[] papers and property to which the client is
proposals.evidence: Exclamation mark and space are OCR corruption in bracket notation; PDF shows empty brackets.

proposals.source_quote: entitled and refund[] any advance payment of fee or expense that has not
proposals.evidence: Exclamation mark and space are OCR corruption in bracket notation; PDF shows empty brackets.

proposals.source_quote: order him to pay costs of the disciplinary proceeding in the amount of $250. [¶2]
1.      disbarment;         2.     within 10 days of signing the stipulation
proposals.evidence: Extra dot in list numbering is OCR artifact; PDF shows proper spacing between item number and text.

proposals.source_quote: from the practice of law in North Dakota, effective immediately. We order him
proposals.evidence: Hyphen is OCR corruption; PDF shows period at end of sentence.

flags.description: Citation number error: DB shows '2015 ND 157' but authoritative PDF clearly shows '2015 ND 182' for the second Disciplinary Board v. Lee citation in paragraph 2. This is a case citation, flagged as high-risk for independent verification and correction authority approval given the sensitivity of judicial citations.
